evals.prompt: I need to add an auth guard so unauthenticated users trying to access the cart get redirected to the login screen.
evals.expected_output: AutoRouteGuard implementation checking auth state, applied to CartRoute in @AutoRouterConfig, redirect to LoginRoute

evals.prompt: How do I navigate to OrderDetailPage and pass an orderId parameter using auto_route?
evals.expected_output: Use generated typed route: context.pushRoute(OrderDetailRoute(orderId: id)), not string-based navigation

evals.prompt: I have a bottom tab bar with 3 tabs using auto_route. When I switch tabs the scroll position resets — how do I preserve state?
evals.expected_output: Use AutoTabsRouter with children routes, IndexedStack preserves state, configure initialRoute and tabs properly

should_not_trigger: Add a back button to the app bar
